titleStmt.title: SII 23.291: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 291. (A.R. No. 291 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—in the same place Rājarājadēva III: year 27: 1243-44 A.D.

summary.p: The details of the date given viz., Makara, śu. 5, Wednesday, Pushya are irregular, as Makara śu. 5 and Pushya can never combine. This registers the sale of a quarter vēli of land by the temple for 2500 kāśu, to one Tiruvēkampamuḍaiyār an Ārya from Kārmiṟai (Kashmir ?) who endowed it back to the temple for the formation of a flowergarden. Portions of the record are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śrī Irācarācatevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 7Āvatu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvepakṣattu pañcamiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ
Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭecuratevar tiru varuḷāl Ik koyil cikkāriyañ ceyvāṉum cimākeśvarakaṇ kāṇi ceyvārkaḷum tevakaṉmi koyilkaṇa
Iṉṉāyaṉārkku tirupaḷḷitāmatirunantavaṉam Ākak kāṟmiṟai Āriya ril tiruvekampamuṭaiyār vilaikoṇṭu viṭa niyamitta nilamāy Ivarkku viṟṟa nilamāvatu Iṉṉāyanār
tirunantavaṉam Ākka Aṉupavittu varukiṟa nilamāy Ivarkku viṟṟa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai Iṉṉāyaṉār tirumañcaṉaperuvaḻikku meṟku teṉpāṟkellaiyum mel
kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai cuṅkantavirttacoḻamaṅkalattu tirunāmattu kāṇi tiruñāṉacampantaṉ kuḷattukku teṟkum Āka Icainta Iṉṉāṉ kel
menokkiṉa maramum kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum Akappaṭa viṟṟu kuṭuttu koḷvatāṉa Emmil Icainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu 2 1000 5 100 Ikkācu Iraṇṭāyirat
ṭārattu Oṭukku koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Āticaṇṭecura tevarkaṉmikaḷom Iṉṉilam kālum tirupaḷḷit tāma tirunantavaṉam Āka
marutūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum tevakaṉmi Irācarācapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum cimākecurakaṅkāṇi kāṭṭikaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Eṉṟum Ivai cikāriyam vaḷavappallavaraiya
tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiya nāyanāṟku tiruppaḷḷittāma tirunantavaṉa māka koṇṭu viṭṭeṉ kāmiṟai Āriyaril tiruvekampamuṭaiyār Eḻuttu It tirunantavaṉak kuṭikaḷukku jivita
virutarājapayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu miḻalaināṭṭup puliyūr payirivāykkaḷat tuṭaiyāṉ brahmateyattu viyakāmittiraṉ civatevapaṭṭarāṉa niṟkaḷi civarpakkal muṉṉāḷil vilaiko
ṭai vāykkālukku meṟkum vaṭakkum melpārkkellai Inniṟkaḷi civar nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai Āṟṟūr vāykkālukkut teṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa pukalokacuntari
l niṉṟa turavil cempāti Innilam Araikkum Iṟaikku nirppirātti yum Uḷppaṭa nāṉ vilaikoṇṭa pramāṇappaṭiye Ivarkaḷukkuk kuṭuttamaiyil Innilattukku Ūrmāvinta kaṭamai kuṭimai Iṟuttu
Digital edition of SII 23.291 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
